scripts.build: if [ -d ../../../opencode ]; then mkdir -p ../../apps/desktop/src-tauri/binaries && cd ../../../opencode && bun build --compile --minify ../deepseek-code-public/packages/sidecar/src/index.ts --outfile ../deepseek-code-public/apps/desktop/src-tauri/binaries/opencode-sidecar-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -d ' ' -f 2); fi
